task.instruction: look to your left for a wooden plank that is of the colors of the Ukraine flag, once you find it turn to the right until you see the red arrow that is on top of the windows, turn in the direction pointed at by that arrow till you see a cardboard cutout of person holding a bottle and a glass, then move towards them

ltl_plan.ltl_nl_formula: F pi_4 & (!pi_4 U pi_3) & (!pi_3 U pi_2) & (!pi_2 U pi_1)

pi_predicates.pi_1: Look to your left for a wooden plank that is of the colors of the Ukraine flag
pi_predicates.pi_2: Turn to the right until you see the red arrow that is on top of the windows
pi_predicates.pi_3: Turn in the direction pointed at by that arrow till you see a cardboard cutout of person holding a bottle and a glass
pi_predicates.pi_4: Move towards the cardboard cutout of person holding a bottle and a glass
